case_title: IBEW LOCAL 6 VS GREEN, BRUCE J.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-19-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-28-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-28-2006, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBEW LOCAL 6 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREEN, BRUCE J. DENIAL OF MOTION TO VACATE REVERSED NO EVIDENCE WAS INTRODUCED TO SHOW THE BASIS FOR THE IMPOSITION OF CHARGES AGAINST APP, WHETHER AS A FINE, GENERAL OR SPECIFIC DAMAGES, OR LIQUIDATED DAMAGES. WHILE APP MAY HAVE VIOLATED THE INTERNAL AGREEMENT, RESPON GAVE NO BASIS FOR CALCULATING DAMAGES FOR THE VIOLATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POSTPONEMENT REQUEST BY DEFT FILED, TO BE SIGNED BY THE COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBEW LOCAL 6 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, BRUCE J. $4,880.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,991.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-17-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-19-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBEW LOCAL 6 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, BRUCE J. $4,880.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,991.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
